zh-CN.title: 情商（EQ）测试
zh-CN.subtitle: 60 题深度测评，覆盖自我认知、情绪调节、同理心与人际管理。

consent.text: 我已知晓本测评仅用于心理素质自评与成长参考，不构成医疗诊断或治疗建议。

disclaimer.text: 本报告基于自评数据生成，仅供个人成长与沟通训练参考。

en.title: EQ Test (Emotional Intelligence Assessment)
en.subtitle: A 60-item deep assessment across self-awareness, regulation, empathy, and relationship management.

consent.text: I understand this assessment is for self-reflection and personal growth only, and is not a medical diagnosis.

disclaimer.text: This report is generated from self-reported data for educational and self-development purposes.
